title: Ennamma Kannu Sowkiyama Lyrics Mr Barath
stanzas:
ennamaa kannu
sollamaa kannu

ennamaa kannu
sollamaa kannu
ennamaa kannu
sowkiyamaa
aamammaa kannu
sowkiyamthaan

ada ennamaa kannu
sowkiyamaa
aamammaa kannu
sowkiyamthaan

yaanaikkum chinna
poonai potiyaa
thuniju modhithaan
pattaa paadu paathiyaa

yaarukkum anjidaatha
singamthaan
urasi paarunga
mangidaatha thangamthaan

ennamaa kannu
sowkiyamaa
aamammaa kannu
sowkiyamthaan (2)

velli panam ennidathil
kottikidakku
vetti payal unnidathil
enna irukku.

sathiyatha pesukindra
nenjam irukku
uththamana nee irundhaa
meesai murukku.

sathiyatha nambi ..
laabam illa thambi..
nichchayamaa needhi
vellum oru thaedhi.

unnaalathaan aagaathu vegaathu
konjamthaane vendhirukku
michcham vegattum.

ennamaa kannu
sowkiyamaa
aamammaa kannu
sowkiyamthaan

eppavum naan vachcha kuri
thappiyathilla.
ennudaiya sollai yaarum
thattiyathilla

innoruvan enna vandhu
thottadhum illa
thottavana thappikka naan
vittadhum illa.

meesaiyila mannu
ottunatha ennu.
paayum puli naanthaan
paakka pora neethaan.

summaa thaan poochaandi
ye kaattaadhe.
namma kitta poduriye
thappu thaalam thaan.

ennamaa kannu
sollamaa kannu

ennamaa kannu
sowkiyamaa
aamammaa kannu
sowkiyamthaan (2)

yaanaikkum chinna
poonai potiyaa
thuniju modhithaan
pattaa paadu paathiyaa

yaarukkum anjidaatha
singamthaan
urasi paarunga
mangidaatha thangamthaan

sowkiyamaa
aamammaa kannu
sowkiyamthaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Ennamma Kannu Sowkiyama expresses themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the happiness found in love and relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is from the movie Mr Barath, which is known for its engaging music and memorable performances.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the iconic voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, both of whom are celebrated for their contributions to Tamil music.

When was the song released?

Ennamma Kannu Sowkiyama was released on January 10, 1986, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennamma Kannu Sowkiyama, the song encapsulates a joyful celebration of love and life, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The lively melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners back to cherished moments. The collaboration between Malaysia Vasudevan and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, under the masterful composition of Ilaiyaraaja, creates an unforgettable auditory experience. This song not only entertains but also resonates deeply with emotions, making it a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennamma Kannu Sowkiyama is a timeless classic that captures the essence of joy and nostalgia, featuring the mesmerizing voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam. This enchanting melody, composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, resonates with listeners, evoking cherished memories and a sense of celebration. Dive into the vibrant world of Mr Barath and experience the magic of this unforgettable song.
stanzaMeanings: What is it, my eyes, tell me, eyes?
What is it, my eyes, tell me, is my eye at ease, oh grandmother, my eye is indeed at ease.
Oh, what is it, my eye at ease, oh grandmother, my eye is indeed at ease.
Is a small cat placed on me, it has been made to sing, half of the song is sung.
The lion that does not fear anyone is the one to watch, look at the golden treasure that does not fear anyone.
What is it, my eyes, tell me, oh grandmother, my eye is indeed at ease.
Silver money is given to me, what is there in your place?
The heart that speaks the truth is there, if you are noble, the mustache is curled.
Believing in the truth... there is no gain, brother... surely justice will prevail in a search.
Because of you, it won't happen, it will take a little time, the speed is also too much.
What is it, my eyes, tell me, oh grandmother, my eye is indeed at ease.
I have never missed the target I aimed for. No one can deny my words.
No one has come to touch me, nor have I let anyone touch me.
The mustache is like the earth, I am the tiger that will come to see you.
Don't just sit idle, don't show off. The mistake is in the rhythm we have.
What is it, my eyes, tell me, eyes?
What is it, my eyes, tell me, is my eye at ease, oh grandmother, my eye is indeed at ease.
Is a small cat placed on me, it has been made to sing, half of the song is sung.
The lion that does not fear anyone is the one to watch, look at the golden treasure that does not fear anyone.
What is it, my eyes, tell me, oh grandmother, my eye is indeed at ease.
